items.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to fight war crime charges

items.summary: The Sussexes' four-day tour of Australia appears to have fallen flat with some.

items.summary: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".

items.title: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US

items.summary: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.

items.summary: The discussion is a sign the AI firm's technology may be too critical for even the US government to do without.

items.summary: Serhiy and Iryna married 40 years ago, unaware a nuclear reactor had exploded less than 3 miles away.

items.summary: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.
